title: New York City's Greenhouse Gas Emissions

contextualAttributes.comment: Movement of the spheres like air particles.

visualChannels.comment: The video time is mapped to real time but in different scales

visualElements.comment: The cars emphasize the data theme, as one of the most important sources of greenhouse emissions.
The clouds later give a height reference to understand better the amount of greenhouse emissions.

contextualAttributes.comment: The camera moves to provide an overview from different perspectives.
